codeReview.summary: Reviewed both prior failed features and the fix commit. The fix resolves all previously blocking findings: timeout stdout/stderr are decoded to str in sandbox timeout handling, cross-category expert problems are now referenced from original reasoning/instruction definitions (with function_signature and test_cases added in place), duplicate cloned definitions were removed from coding_problems.py, and library_schema test cases were redesigned into five distinct structural checks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Architecture shared-state documentation remains out of sync with the implemented quality-benchmark structure and sandbox interface.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md describes a problems/ package and SandboxResult fields `passed/exit_code/timed_out/duration_sec` with `sandbox.run(...)`, while code uses flat modules and `SandboxResult(success, stdout, stderr, error_type, return_code, execution_time_sec)` via `execute_code(...)`.

summary: Pass: fix feature commit 19ba5c2 adequately addresses both prior failed reviews (code-execution-sandbox and convert-coding-problems-to-execution). Transcript skeleton and original+fix diffs were reviewed; no remaining blocking defects found in scope.
